title: systemtest: don't copy the same image twice
body:
[root@dhcp-14-124 skopeo]# bats -f "copy: don't copy the same image twice" systemtest/020-copy.bats 
 ✓ copy: don't copy the same image twice

1 test, 0 failures

Signed-off-by: Alex Jia <chuanchang.jia@gmail.com>

comments.body: @chuanchang You still interested in moving this one forward?
Since there was never any response, I am closing.  Reopen if there will be further work.
